---
title: "ECHR - Reweighting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-22"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}

library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Load poll country averages
country_avg_poll <- read.csv(here("output", "country_avg_echr_full.csv"))

# Rename poll columns
country_avg_poll <- country_avg_poll %>%
  rename(
    poll_remain = "Britain.should.remain.a.member.of.the.European.Convention.on.Human.Rights..ECHR.",
    poll_leave  = "Britain.should.leave.the.European.Convention.on.Human.Rights..ECHR.",
    poll_dk     = "Don.t.know"
  )

# Load constituency geography data
aux <- read.csv("https://mrp-psf.ams3.digitaloceanspaces.com/other-files/const_data_full_new.csv")
aux <- aux %>%
  mutate(const_name = gsub("Ynys Mon", "Ynys Môn", const_name)) %>%
  mutate(
    region_2 = case_when(
      region_name %in% c(
        "East Midlands", "East of England", "Greater London",
        "North East England", "North West England", "South East England",
        "South West England", "West Midlands", "Yorkshire and the Humber",
        "London", "England"
      ) ~ "England",
      region_name == "Scotland" ~ "Scotland",
      region_name == "Wales"    ~ "Wales",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

# Load constituency-level MRP predictions
preds_echr <- read.csv(here("output", "preds_echr_reweighted_full.csv"))

# Join region onto predictions
preds_echr <- preds_echr %>%
  left_join(aux %>% select(const_name, region_2), by = "const_name") %>%
  mutate(region_2 = case_when(
    const_name == "Ynys MÃ´n" ~ "Wales",
    TRUE ~ region_2
  ))

# Join poll country averages
preds_echr <- preds_echr %>%
  left_join(
    country_avg_poll %>% select(country, poll_remain, poll_leave, poll_dk),
    by = c("region_2" = "country")
  )

# Compute MRP country averages for each category
preds_echr <- preds_echr %>%
  group_by(region_2) %>%
  mutate(
    mrp_avg_remain = mean(remain_reweighted),
    mrp_avg_leave  = mean(leave_reweighted),
    mrp_avg_dk     = mean(dk_reweighted)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Apply additive adjustment to each category
preds_echr_final <- preds_echr %>%
  mutate(
    remain_final = remain_reweighted + (poll_remain - mrp_avg_remain),
    leave_final  = leave_reweighted  + (poll_leave  - mrp_avg_leave),
    dk_final     = dk_reweighted     + (poll_dk     - mrp_avg_dk),
    net_final    = remain_final - leave_final
  ) %>%
  select(const_name, remain_final, region_2, leave_final, dk_final, net_final)

# Sanity check
preds_echr %>%
  group_by(region_2) %>%
  summarise(
    mrp_remain        = mean(remain_reweighted),
    reweighted_remain = mean(remain_reweighted + (poll_remain - mrp_avg_remain)),
    poll_remain       = first(poll_remain)
  )

write.csv(preds_echr_final, here("output", "preds_echr_final_full.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(preds_echr_reweighted, here("output", "preds_echr_reweighted.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
